calendar.matters:
Objection To Fiduciary'S Account And Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust And For An Order Compelling Final Account And Report And Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Off Calendar

Objection To Fiduciary'S Account And Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust And For An Order Compelling Final Account And Report And Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Continued To Oct-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Laurie Chan. Brett Lytle for Less Cahn.

The Parties elected to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation is to be completed by October 22, 2010. The matter was continued to October 26, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
